lines.text: Might I trouble you for a light, young {Male=man;Female=lady}?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Ah well, a cigar without smoke... My granddaughter told me Ragunna's rain is a bad omen. Can't argue with that now, can I?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Oh, did it capture your interest as well? Or are you simply passing the time until the rain ends?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Haha, it's only the investor's nature in me. I find myself irresistibly drawn to items of unique value.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Then it seems you will have to put up with me for a while.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The Montelli family prides themselves on their eclectic taste in art. Any style by any artist can find its home within their quarter.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Art knows no boundaries of time, place, or the mind. Here we stand, united by the rain, drawn to the same painting.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: They say in art, we glimpse pieces of our own soul.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What do you make of this piece? Care to share your thoughts?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You have keener eyes than I expected. Seeing essence beneath the surface.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hahaha, it is typical of symbolism to conceal ideas in a play of colors and forms... But sometimes, simplicity is more powerful.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Indeed. True artistry lies not only in what is painted, but in what is left unsaid.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I share the same view, except that I'm somehow saddened by the part that forsakes its character to achieve balance.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: ...Perhaps chosen by the artist for its uniqueness.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Now is not the time to cling to the existing balance, but to embrace the unknown, seek change, and carve out one's path... just as she once did.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family
